_comment: Copy this file to claude_usage.config.json (next to the script, or at ~/.claude/claude_usage.config.json) and edit. All keys are optional — anything you omit falls back to the built-in default.
_timezone_help: Day/week/month buckets use this zone. null = your machine's local time. Or an IANA name like 'America/Chicago', 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London' (Windows may need: pip install tzdata).
_plan_help: Your Claude subscription, for the plan check: 'pro', 'max_5x', 'max_20x', 'api', or null for no keep/switch verdict. Override per run with --plan.
